label: Garden AI chat
items: Read-aloud now only voices new replies — opening the chat no longer reads the previous message aloud.
When you ask to see a plant, the chat now AI-checks each photo for relevance and hides any that don't clearly show the plant, so you get better-matching images.
Plant photos in the chat now carry a short note that they're sourced from the web and may not show the exact plant or variety.
